allow: PowerShell($paths = @\('C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe','C:\\wamp64\\bin\\mysql','C:\\laragon\\bin\\mysql','C:\\Program Files\\MySQL','C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\MySQL','C:\\ProgramData\\MySQL'\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output '---'; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files' -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'mysql|mariadb|laragon|xampp|wamp' } | Select-Object FullName)
PowerShell(& 'C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe' -u root -e "SHOW COLLATION WHERE Charset='utf8mb4' AND Collation LIKE '%ai%';" 2>&1)

PowerShell(& 'C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe' -u root -e "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS aserefood_db; CREATE DATABASE aserefood_db CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci; SHOW DATABASES LIKE 'aserefood%';" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node' } | Select-Object Id, StartTime, CPU; Write-Output '---'; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object State, OwningProcess)
PowerShell(& 'C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe' -u root -e "REPAIR TABLE mysql.db; REPAIR TABLE mysql.user; REPAIR TABLE mysql.tables_priv; REPAIR TABLE mysql.columns_priv;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(& 'C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe' -u aserefood_user -paserefood_pass aserefood_db -e "SELECT 'connected to db' AS status;" 2>&1)
